parameters.name: generate_qr_code
parameters.description: Generate a QR code image from text or a URL. Returns an image URL that can be shared. Parameters: data (text or URL to encode into QR code), size (optional, image dimensions like '300x300', default '300x300')

schema.description: Text or URL to encode into a QR code
Image size in pixels (e.g. 300x300). Optional, default 300x300
